}

for f = 1, totalFrames do
    local frameData = frames[f]
    if frameData then
        for y = 1, 64 do
            local row = frameData[y]
            if row then
                for x = 1, 64 do
                    local p = row[x]
                    if p and p[4] and p[4] > 0 then
                        local b = Instance.new("Frame")
                        b.Size = UDim2.new(0, 4, 0, 4)
                        b.Position = UDim2.new(0, (x-1)*4, 0, (y-1)*4)
                        b.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(p[1], p[2], p[3])
                        b.BorderSizePixel = 0
                        b.Parent = frameHolder
                        b.Visible = (f == 1)
                        pixelFrames[f][y][x] = b
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

local function showFrame(frameNum)
    for f = 1, totalFrames do
        for y = 1, 64 do
            for x = 1, 64 do
                local b = pixelFrames[f] and pixelFrames[f][y] and pixelFrames[f][y][x]
                if b then
                    b.Visible = (f == frameNum)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    showFrame(currentFrame)
    currentFrame = currentFrame + 1
    if currentFrame > totalFrames then
        currentFrame = 1
    end
    wait(delay / 1000)
end)
